title: I Will Teach You to Be Rich
author: Ramit Sethi
subline: A six-week program for the rest of your life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A checkbook / ledger with one row AUTOMATED. The row is highlighted RED. Six weeks = six rows below. The 6th (final) row is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Ledger table -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <rect x="-500" y="-320" width="1000" height="600"/>
      <!-- Column dividers -->
      <line x1="-160" y1="-320" x2="-160" y2="280"/>
      <line x1="180" y1="-320" x2="180" y2="280"/>
      <!-- 6 row dividers -->
      <line x1="-500" y1="-220" x2="500" y2="-220"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="-120" x2="500" y2="-120"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="-20" x2="500" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="80" x2="500" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="180" x2="500" y2="180"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Header row labels -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="-490" y="-300" text-anchor="start">WEEK</text>
      <text x="-150" y="-300" text-anchor="start">ACTION</text>
      <text x="190" y="-300" text-anchor="start">$</text>
    </g>
    <!-- 6 weeks of content -->
    <g font-size="18" font-weight="400" fill="#cccccc">
      <text x="-490" y="-180" text-anchor="start">01</text><text x="-150" y="-180" text-anchor="start">Optimize credit cards</text><text x="500" y="-180" text-anchor="end">$0</text>
      <text x="-490" y="-80" text-anchor="start">02</text><text x="-150" y="-80" text-anchor="start">Open high-yield savings</text><text x="500" y="-80" text-anchor="end">$5,000</text>
      <text x="-490" y="20" text-anchor="start">03</text><text x="-150" y="20" text-anchor="start">Automate 401k</text><text x="500" y="20" text-anchor="end">$19,500</text>
      <text x="-490" y="120" text-anchor="start">04</text><text x="-150" y="120" text-anchor="start">Index funds</text><text x="500" y="120" text-anchor="end">$50,000</text>
      <text x="-490" y="220" text-anchor="start">05</text><text x="-150" y="220" text-anchor="start">Roth IRA</text><text x="500" y="220" text-anchor="end">$6,000</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The 6th row: highlight RED — the moment money works while you sleep -->
    <g>
      <rect x="-500" y="180" width="1000" height="100" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="-490" y="220" text-anchor="start" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff">06</text>
      <text x="-150" y="220" text-anchor="start" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff">Compound interest</text>
      <text x="500" y="220" text-anchor="end" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff">$∞</text>
    </g>
    <!-- A whisper label outside the box -->
    <text x="-500" y="350" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">A SIX-WEEK LEDGER · DAY 42</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 6-week ledger. The first 5 weeks are ash rows. Week 6 (compound interest) is the RED row — the moment money works for you. 200px weight-500 title at the top — the title is the action.
